primary_source: Mayer, M. G. (1949). On Closed Shells in Nuclei. Physical Review, 75(12), 1969-1970. DOI: 10.1103/PhysRev.75.1969.
note: a=82 is coprime to 3 (82 mod 3=1). 40 routes, all Cosmos. The lead nucleus Pb-208 (Z=82) is doubly magic (N=126 as well); a=82 itself is pure Cosmos while a=126 is the full-access partner.
